id: handle-get-link-by-code

description: "Looks up a link by its short code instead of its internal ID"

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/links/by-code/{code}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Looks up a link by its short code instead of its internal ID
